name: Firoz Miya
subtitle: Network Engineer & Systems Administrator — 8+ years
headline: I keep enterprise servers, networks and Linux containers running — with deep expertise in Red Hat Enterprise Linux environments.
summary: Network Engineer and Systems Administrator with 8+ years of experience delivering enterprise infrastructure, network operations, Windows Server administration, virtualization, and cloud-based solutions. Recently earned the RHCSA (EX200) certification, strengthening hands-on expertise in SELinux, LVM, systemd, firewalld, shell scripting, and enterprise Linux administration. Experienced in deploying, managing, and optimizing Red Hat Enterprise Linux workloads both on-premises and on Azure Red Hat Virtual Machines, with a strong focus on security, automation, and operational excellence.
